parameters.query:
SELECT
  id, business_name, website, domain, email,
  email_status, lead_status, outreach_status,
  export_status, smartlead_status,
  needs_manual_review, created_at, updated_at
FROM lead_master
WHERE outreach_status = 'none'
  AND lead_status = 'approved'
  AND email_status IN ('verified', 'risky')
  AND email IS NOT NULL
  AND domain IS NOT NULL
  AND COALESCE(smartlead_status, 'none') NOT IN ('exported')
  AND COALESCE(outreach_status, 'none') NOT IN ('queued', 'sent', 'replied', 'bounced')
ORDER BY created_at ASC
LIMIT 50

UPDATE lead_master
SET
  export_status = '{{ $json.export_decision }}',
  smartlead_status = CASE
    WHEN COALESCE(smartlead_status, 'none') = 'exported'
    THEN smartlead_status
    ELSE '{{ $json.smartlead_decision }}'
  END,
  needs_manual_review = CASE
    WHEN {{ $json.review_decision }} = true THEN true
    ELSE needs_manual_review
  END,
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}'::uuid
  AND COALESCE(smartlead_status, 'none') != 'exported'
  AND COALESCE(outreach_status, 'none') NOT IN ('queued', 'sent', 'replied', 'bounced')
RETURNING id, export_status, smartlead_status, needs_manual_review
